title: HISTORICAL ANALYSIS OF THE RELATIONS WITH THE ECHR
author: Gaivoronskaya L.V.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The author analyzes the relations of a number of participating countries with the European Court of Human Rights, and mainly with the Russian Federation throughout their historical cooperation: development, formation, emergence of confrontation and termination of relations.
steps_raw: The author analyzes the relations of a number of participating countries with the European Court of Human Rights, and mainly with the Russian Federation throughout their historical cooperation: development, formation, emergence of confrontation and termination of relations.
keywords: European Convention on Human Rights; relations between the Russian Federation and the  ECHR; historical analysis of relations with the ECHR
